# SOC Onboarding Checklist

Use this checklist to ensure every new SOC analyst has the tools, access, and training they need from Day 1.

## Phase 1: Access & Tools (Day 1-3)
- [ ] Laptop & Hardware setup
- [ ] Domain / VPN access
- [ ] SIEM / XDR seat assigned (Read-only initially)
- [ ] Ticket / Case Management access
- [ ] Team Communication (Slack/Teams/Discord)
- [ ] MFA configured

## Phase 2: Documentation (Day 4-7)
- [ ] Read the [SOC Charter & Governance](../management/governance.md)
- [ ] Review the [Incident Response Plan](../incident-response/ir-lifecycle.md)
- [ ] Walkthrough of common Playbooks
- [ ] Review the [Shift Handover Process](../management/handover-model.md)

## Phase 3: Shadowing (Week 1-2)
- [ ] Observe L1 analyst for 2 full shifts
- [ ] Observe 1 Incident Triage meeting
- [ ] Complete "Initial Alert Review" training
- [ ] Learn the Escalation Matrix

## Phase 4: Hands-on (Week 3-4)
- [ ] Handle 5 low-priority alerts with supervision
- [ ] Document 1 False Positive findings
- [ ] Present 1 threat research finding to the team
- [ ] Sign-off on L1 Proficiency Guide
